ingredients_text: 44% whole oatmeal, 16% sultanas dried grapes (sultanal raisins, sunflower oil), sugar, palm oil, 5% cornflakes (4,8% cornmeal, salt, barley malt extract, emulsifier: lecithins (sunflower), 4,5% banana chips (3,37% banana, coconut fat, sugar, natural banana flavour), 4,5% coconut chips, 4% cereal balls (pieces of corn, wheat flour , sugar, rice flour, salt), wheat flour, glucose syrup, 2% pieces of dehydrated apples (1,98% apple pieces,  antioxidants: citric acid, ascorbic acid), oligofructose, honey, barley malt extract, salt, caramelized sugar, cinnamon, natural aroma, possible traces of other cereals containing gluten, soy, milk, nuts and peanuts,
